SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2011 IS CONTINUED TO APR-11-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S EMPLOYEE ISREAL DEDIO APPEARED TODAY AND PRESENTED THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WITH A PERSONAL MONEY ORDER IN THE AMOUNT OF $693.13, WHICH THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR STATES SATISFIES THE JUDGMENT.
